title: Proclamation No. 477, s. 1939
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 477

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF PROCLAMATION NO. 448, SERIES OF 1932, AND RESERVING FOR THE USE OF THE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE AND COMMERCE, A PARCEL OF LAND IN THE CITY OF DAVAO.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, I hereby exclude from the operation of Proclamation Numbered Four hundred forty-eight, series of nineteen hundred and thirty-two, and reserve for the use of the Department of Agriculture and Commerce, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcel of land located in the City of Davao, Island of Mindanao, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Swo-16190, to wit:

Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-16190, N. 51° 25′ E. 1,057.74 m., more or less, from monument No. 19, Davao townsite, thence N. 86° 45′ E. 23.50 m. to point 2; N. 86° 45′ E. 23.51 m. to point 3; N. 86°. 51′ E. 6.00 m. to point 4; N. 86° 47′ E. 23.50 m. to point 5; N. 86° 45′ E. 23.50 m. to point 6; S. 3° 14′ E. 29.50 m. to point 7; S. 3° 15′ E. 29.52 m. to point 8; S. 3° 15′ E. 29.49 m. to point 9; S. 3° 14′ E. 29.51 m. to point 10; S. 3° 14′ E. 29.50 m. to point 11; S. 86° 45′ W. 23.50 m. to point 12; S. 86° 47′ W. 23.52 m. to point 13; S. 86° 45′ W. 5.99 m. to point 14; S. 86° 47′ W. 23.50 m. to point 15; S. 86° 45′ W. 23.50 m. to point 16; N. 3° 14′ W. 29.50 m. to point 17; N. 3° 15′ W. 29.51 m. to point 18; N. 3° 12′ W. 29.50 m. to point 19; N. 3° 16′ W. 29.51 m. to point 20; N. 3° 14′ W. 29.50 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 14,748 square meters.

Points 1, 6, 11, and 16, ‘old B. P. W./D. C. S. M. concrete monuments; points 2, 3, 4, and 5, old P. L. S. concrete monuments; and the rest are old P. L. S./B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north by lot No. 466; on the east, by lot No. 467; on the south, by lot No. 477-B of plan Bsd-4335-Amd.-2; and on the west, by lot No. 477-B of plan Bsd-4335-Amd.-2.

Bearings true. Declination, 2° 08′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-16190.

Surveyed: March 19, 1935-February 27, 1936.

Approved: October 7, 1939.

NOTE.—Lots Nos. 19 to 38, Bsd-4335 and lot No. 477-A, Bsd-4335-Amd.-2 are consolidated into lot No. 478, Bsd-4335 as surveyed for the Commonwealth of the Philippines.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-seventh day of October, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-nine, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fourth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source : Legislative Library, House of Representatives
